title: Shobhnath temple

topPlaces.name: Jetavana
topPlaces.description: Jetavana (lit. 'Jeta's grove') or Jethavanārāma (lit. 'Jetavana Monastery') was one of the most famous of the vihāras (Buddhist monasteries) in what is now Uttar Pradesh, India. It was the second vihāra donated to the Buddha after the Venuvana in Rajgir.

topPlaces.name: Shravasti
topPlaces.description: Shravasti (Sanskrit: श्रावस्ती, IAST: Śrāvastī; Pali: 𑀲𑀸𑀯𑀢𑁆𑀣𑀻, romanized: Sāvatthī) is a town in Shravasti district in Indian state of Uttar Pradesh. It was the capital of the ancient Indian kingdom of Kosala, where the Buddha lived most after his enlightenment.

topPlaces.name: Katra, Gonda
topPlaces.description: Katra is a town and a nagar panchayat in Gonda district in the Indian state of Uttar Pradesh.

topPlaces.name: Ikauna
topPlaces.description: Ikauna is a town and nagar panchayat in the Shrawasti district in the Indian state of Uttar Pradesh. It is closely attached to the Shrawasti.

items.note: Jetavana (lit. 'Jeta's grove') or Jethavanārāma (lit. 'Jetavana Monastery') was one of the most famous of the vihāras (Buddhist monasteries) in what is now Uttar Pradesh, India. It was the second vihāra donated to the Buddha after the Venuvana in Rajgir.

Shravasti (Sanskrit: श्रावस्ती, IAST: Śrāvastī; Pali: 𑀲𑀸𑀯𑀢𑁆𑀣𑀻, romanized: Sāvatthī) is a town in Shravasti district in Indian state of Uttar Pradesh. It was the capital of the ancient Indian kingdom of Kosala, where the Buddha lived most after his enlightenment.
Katra is a town and a nagar panchayat in Gonda district in the Indian state of Uttar Pradesh.
Ikauna is a town and nagar panchayat in the Shrawasti district in the Indian state of Uttar Pradesh. It is closely attached to the Shrawasti.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Shobhnath temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Shobhnath temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 25–42°C and winters are 7–24°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Shobhnath temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Chaudhary Charan Singh International Airport, Lucknow (142 km) and the nearest railway station is Lucknow Charbagh (135 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Shobhnath temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Shobhnath temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Shobhnath temple?
faq.a: Stays in Shobhnath temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Shobhnath temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Jetavana, Shravasti, Katra, Gonda, Ikauna.
